name: carta-plugins
description: Official Carta plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: carta-cap-table
plugins.description: Carta Cap Table plugin — skills and hooks for querying cap tables, grants, SAFEs, 409A valuations, waterfall scenarios, and more

plugins.name: carta-investors
plugins.description: Carta Investors plugin — skills for querying investors data, performance benchmarks, regulatory reporting, AGM deck generation, brand extraction, and more via the Carta MCP server

plugins.name: carta-crm
plugins.description: Manage the Carta CRM conversationally — search, add, update, and enrich investors, companies, contacts, deals, notes, and fundraisings via the Carta CRM MCP Server
